en.extract:
The blue-winged laughingthrush (Trochalopteron squamatum) is a bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is found in Eastern Himalaya, Yunnan, Myanmar and Laos where its natural habitat is the dense undergrowth of subtropical or tropical moist broadleaved evergreen montane forests.


Behavior
It has been described as secretive.


References


External links
Hear the call sounds here

The '''blue-winged laughingthrush''' ('''''Trochalopteron squamatum''''') is a [[bird]] in the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Leiothrichidae]]. It is found in [[Eastern Himalaya]], [[Yunnan]], [[Myanmar]] and [[Laos]]<ref name="iucn status 13 November 2021" /> where its natural [[habitat]] is the dense undergrowth<ref name=":0">{{Cite journal |last1=Baral |first1=Milan |last2=Neupane |first2=Anisha |date=2022-06-01 |title=Photographic evidence for Emberiza melanocephala Scopoli, 1769, Trochalopteron squamatum (Gould, 1835) and Lonchura malacca (Linnaeus, 1766) (Aves: Passeriformes) in the Pokhara Valley of Kaski district, Nepal |journal=Journal of Animal Diversity |volume=4 |issue=2 |pages=91–96 |doi=10.52547/jad.2022.4.2.4 |issn=2676-685X|doi-access=free }}</ref> of subtropical or tropical moist<ref name="iucn status 13 November 2021" /> broadleaved evergreen<ref name=":0" /> [[montane forest]]s.<ref name="iucn status 13 November 2021" />

== Behavior ==
It has been described as secretive.<ref name=":0" />

zh.extract:
蓝翅噪鹛（学名：Trochalopteron squamatum），又名鳞斑噪鹛，为圓翅噪鶥屬的鸟类，分布于尼泊尔、锡金、不丹、印度、缅甸、越南以及中国大陆的云南等地，常见于沟谷常绿阔叶林下灌木丛中。该物种的模式产地在喜马拉雅山脉地区。
